name: substack-tools
description: Fetch normalized Substack articles and download referenced media for downstream reading, translation, and Obsidian workflows.

interface.longDescription: Substack Tools fetches public Substack articles through Substack's post JSON endpoint when available, emits normalized content JSON, writes original Markdown/HTML/debug artifacts for local reading, and downloads referenced article media through a separate manifest-producing media skill. Translation and Obsidian vault writes belong to downstream ingestion skills such as content-to-obsidian.
interface.defaultPrompt: Fetch this Substack article and prepare it for local reading or Obsidian ingestion.
